You can use AND, OR and NOT search to locate [[Glossary:Element|elements]] in your [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] (in the picture: '''[[Search menu|Search]] : [[Find elements]]''' (''Ctrl+F'') is used to find all [[Glossary:Element|elements]] that contain the word ''Alzheimer'' but which may also feature (but do not have to) one of the following texts: ''ApoE'', ''PS1'', ''Presenilin'')
